series_metadata.series_description: Reports submitted by county 9-1-1 program committees detailing the sources and amounts of revenue expended to support and all costs incurred to operate the countywide 9-1-1 system and the public safety answering points that are a part of that system.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until stored electronically, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for 5 years or until no longer of administrative value, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
